data.acceptance:
- `src/app/beats/to-active-agent-info.ts` no longer calls `normalizeAgentIdentity` (or any per-provider normaliser).
- Either: (a) the file is deleted and `useAgentInfoMap` reads canonical fields directly off the stamped capsule / step-history entry, OR (b) it is reduced to a pure label formatter taking already-canonical `{ agentName, model, version }`.
- `grep -rn "normalizeAgentIdentity\|normalize.*Model" src/app/` returns zero hits.
- `useAgentInfoMap` `populateFromCapsules` and `overrideFromTerminals` paths read canonical keys, not pre-normalisation hints.
- Existing tests under `src/app/beats/__tests__/page-active-agent-info.test.ts` updated to reflect read-only behaviour.
